titles.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَا حَدَّ لِمَنْ لَا حَدَّ عَلَيْهِ
titles.en: Chapter 56 – There is no Penalty (Hadd) for the one upon whom there is no Penalty (Hadd)

titles.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَا حَدَّ لِمَنْ لَا حَدَّ عَلَيْهِ
titles.en: Chapter 56 – There is no Penalty (Hadd) for the one upon whom there is no Penalty (Hadd)

segments: لَا حَدَّ لِمَنْ لَا حَدَّ عَلَيْهِ .
arabic.text: لَا حَدَّ لِمَنْ لَا حَدَّ عَلَيْهِ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, form his father, from Ibn Mahboub, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,
Abu Abdullahasws has said: ‘There is no Penalty (Hadd) for the one upon whom there is no Penalty (Hadd)’.
en.hubeali.text: Ali Bin Ibrahim, form his father, from Ibn Mahboub, from Is’haq Bin Ammar, Abu Abdullahasws has said: ‘There is no Penalty (Hadd) for the one upon whom there is no Penalty (Hadd)’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَا حَدَّ لِمَنْ لَا حَدَّ عَلَيْهِ
titles.en: Chapter 56 – There is no Penalty (Hadd) for the one upon whom there is no Penalty (Hadd)

segments: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ لَا حَدَّ لِمَنْ لَا حَدَّ عَلَيْهِ يَعْنِي لَوْ أَنَّ مَجْنُوناً قَذَفَ رَجُلًا لَمْ أَرَ عَلَيْهِ شَيْئاً وَ لَوْ قَذَفَهُ رَجُلٌ فَقَالَ لَهُ يَا زَانِ لَمْ يَكُنْ عَلَيْهِ حَدٌّ .
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ لَا حَدَّ لِمَنْ لَا حَدَّ عَلَيْهِ يَعْنِي لَوْ أَنَّ مَجْنُوناً قَذَفَ رَجُلًا لَمْ أَرَ عَلَيْهِ شَيْئاً وَ لَوْ قَذَفَهُ رَجُلٌ فَقَالَ لَهُ يَا زَانِ لَمْ يَكُنْ عَلَيْهِ حَدٌّ .

segments: Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Ayoub, from Fuzeyl Bin Yasaar who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘There is no Penalty (Hadd) for the one upon whom there is no Penalty (Hadd), meaning, if an insane person were to slander a man, Iasws do not see anything upon him, and if a man were to slander him, so he says to him, ‘O adulterer’, there would be no Penalty (Hadd) upon him (either)’.
en.hubeali.text: Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Ayoub, from Fuzeyl Bin Yasaar who said, ‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘There is no Penalty (Hadd) for the one upon whom there is no Penalty (Hadd), meaning, if an insane person were to slander a man, Iasws do not see anything upon him, and if a man were to slander him, so he says to him, ‘O adulterer’, there would be no Penalty (Hadd) upon him (either)’.

narratorChain.raw: ابْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ عَنْ فُضَيْلِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ قَالَ
